member.name: M:Obsolete("Obsolete")
F:.Slot
member.summary: The storage slot changed. Up to 32 bytes, big-endian, zero bytes left trimmed

member.name: F:.ValueRead
member.summary: The value read from the storage slot. Up to 32 bytes, big-endian, zero bytes left trimmed. Because of the way SSTORE operations are charged the slot is always read before being written to

member.name: F:.ValueWritten
member.summary: The new value written to the slot. Up to 32 bytes, big-endian, zero bytes left trimmed. If a value of zero is written the valueWritten will be present but the inner value will be absent. If a value was read and not written this value will not be present.
